creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
Created attachment 169282
add support for osl-1.7

The current port version of appleseed does not support openshadinglanguage 1.7, which I am about to submit an update for.

Based on the commit in the appleseed master branch, the attached patch allows the existing appleseed version to work with osl 1.7

https://github.com/appleseedhq/appleseed/commit/626d25f4c88e506fcce3848d7abb4521adbaaea8

Not related but included in the patch, to get appleseed to run I need to add the non-standard lib path to LDFLAGS
